flow_overview: An authenticated restaurant discovery and reservation service flow where a user opens account settings and updates a restaurant-facing dining profile.
capability_summary: Account menu access to profile settings
Profile saving for reuse in reservations

requirements.text: The system shall provide a location-specific restaurant discovery experience for signed-in users.
requirements.rationale: The opening screens show a Columbus-specific discovery page with restaurant listings and recommendation sections, which directly supports a location-aware browsing capability.

requirements.text: The system shall expose account actions through a global user menu.
requirements.rationale: The sequence moves from the main page to an opened account dropdown that lists profile and other account destinations, directly showing this capability.

requirements.text: The system shall allow authenticated users to navigate from the account menu to a dedicated profile settings area.
requirements.rationale: The ordered flow clearly transitions from the account menu to the profile page, showing direct support for profile-settings navigation.

requirements.text: The system shall present existing profile information in editable, prepopulated form.
requirements.rationale: The profile form already contains values such as name, phone, and email before further edits are made, indicating editable prefilled account data.

requirements.text: The system shall support entry of birthday information using structured month, day, and year controls.
requirements.rationale: The birthday area progresses from placeholders to selected month, day, and year values across successive screenshots, directly demonstrating structured date entry.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to add or edit a short personal bio in their profile.
requirements.rationale: The short-bio field is visible and then populated with user-entered text, directly showing support for short free-text profile notes.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to record allergies and dietary restrictions as profile preferences.
requirements.rationale: The profile page includes a dedicated allergies and restrictions section with selectable options, which directly grounds this profile-preference capability.

requirements.text: The system shall support selecting multiple allergy or restriction tags within the same profile.
requirements.rationale: The flow first shows Dairy selected and then shows Dairy together with Peanuts, demonstrating multi-selection rather than a single exclusive choice.

requirements.text: The system shall provide visible information on which dietary preference is activated.
requirements.rationale: Selected tags change visual state, making active choices distinguishable from inactive ones, which is a visible usability and clarity property of the form.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to add an explanatory note alongside allergies and dietary restrictions.
requirements.rationale: A dedicated text area for allergy and restriction notes is visible throughout the profile workflow, indicating support for supplementary dietary context.

requirements.text: The system shall provide a save action for committing profile changes.
requirements.rationale: A prominent Save button is consistently present at the end of the form, but the sequence does not show the post-save outcome or confirmation.

requirements.text: The system shall communicate how profile information is used in the reservation context.
requirements.rationale: The profile page includes explanatory text stating that information is shared with restaurants a user reserves, which directly shows visible usage guidance.

requirements.text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.
requirements.rationale: The page framing and explanatory text imply that the stored profile is meant to be reused when dining or reserving, but the later reservation-time application is not shown end to end.

requirements.text: The system shall keep account-section navigation available while the user edits profile settings.
requirements.rationale: A persistent left-side account navigation remains visible throughout the editing flow, supporting section awareness and movement across settings areas.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve saved dining preferences and dietary notes when the user later returns to the profile settings area.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: persistence_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-13
Source gold text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.
Generation rationale: This is a close extension of reusable profile preferences into later revisit persistence. The flow strongly suggests editing and saving, but persistence across a later revisit is not directly established by the accepted gold evidence.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.

requirements.text: The system shall pass saved allergy selections and dietary notes into restaurant-facing reservation information.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: partially_fulfilled
Mutation family: external_effect_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-10
Source gold text: The system shall allow users to add an explanatory note alongside allergies and dietary restrictions.
Generation rationale: The gold set already shows profile dietary data and visible explanation about reservation use. Extending that into downstream restaurant-facing delivery is realistic, but the actual external effect is not shown end to end in the flow.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall allow users to add an explanatory note alongside allergies and dietary restrictions.

requirements.text: The system shall allow access to editable profile settings only for the authenticated account owner.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: policy_or_role_extension
Source gold requirement: REQ-03
Source gold text: The system shall allow authenticated users to navigate to a dedicated profile settings area.
Generation rationale: This is a realistic account-policy strengthening of the existing signed-in profile navigation capability. The visible flow supports authenticated access, but ownership and enforcement rules are not fully verifiable from screenshots alone.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall allow authenticated users to navigate to a dedicated profile settings area.

requirements.text: The system shall apply all saved profile dining preferences consistently to every future reservation made from the account.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: abstain
Mutation family: completeness_or_universal_quantifier
Source gold requirement: REQ-13
Source gold text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.
Generation rationale: This strengthens the reuse concept into an always and every reservation guarantee. That kind of universal coverage claim is plausible product behavior, but it goes beyond what a single profile-editing flow can settle.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall let users maintain reusable dining preferences that can inform future reservations.

requirements.text: The system shall present an explicit post-save confirmation or summary indicating that profile edits were stored.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: missing_visible_step
Source gold requirement: REQ-04
Source gold text: The system shall present existing profile information in editable, prepopulated form.
Generation rationale: A save confirmation is a very plausible adjacent workflow phase for profile editing, especially when personal preferences are changed. It stays tightly in scope but is stronger than the accepted gold set and is likely absent from the visible evidence.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall present existing profile information in editable, prepopulated form.

requirements.text: The system shall warn users about unsaved profile changes before they leave the editing flow.
requirements.rationale:
Contrastive import from staged bundle
Intended label: not_fulfilled
Mutation family: stronger_visible_constraint
Source gold requirement: REQ-06
Source gold text: The system shall allow users to add or edit a short personal bio in their profile.
Generation rationale: This is a realistic usability strengthening for a multi-field profile editor that includes free-text edits and preference changes. It remains visibly testable, but the accepted gold flow does not suggest such protective feedback.
requirements.parent_harvest_text: The system shall allow users to add or edit a short personal bio in their profile.
